creator: placente35ict@yahoo.co.jp
text:
By encountering below info, 

https://bugs.archlinux.org/task/31352

especially below written above

rm /home/user/.config/libreoffice -> no effect


I checked my home directory  ~/.config/libreoffice   and noticed lock file has been created.

~/.config/libreoffice/.lock

I renamed it to  ".lock-old" and now LibreOffice is launched normally.
